title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services family as a Backend Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
